Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer

IBM G8264

The IBM G8264 is built on the Broadcom Trident+ (BCM56840) ASIC.

Field Value
Ports 48 SFP+ and 4 QSFP
RX Queues 8Q
Total Buffer 9 MB/switch
TX Buffer Not on data sheet

The TX buffer size was not published by IBM. A Tolly Group report performed microburst testing on this switch — see the Tolly report.

References

  • IBM G8264 Datasheet
  • Tolly Microburst Test Report

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
